reasoning: Benzal chloride (PhCHCl2) is a benzyl-type compound bearing two chlorine atoms on the benzylic carbon, making it a benzyl halide (geminal dichloride on the benzylic position). It belongs to the aryl halide/organohalogen family as it is an organic compound with chlorine substituents attached to a carbon adjacent to a benzene ring.
substance_name: α, α-dichlorotoluene; benzylidene chloride; benzal chloride
